DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS DEPOSITION AND DECLARATION, THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Foster Wheeler Llc (Fka Foster Wheeler Corporation) To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jennifer Alesio, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Clifford Hall
Shelley Tinkoff, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Foster Wheeler

After hearing, Plaintiff Ronald Borden's Motion To Compel Defendant Foster Wheeler LLC To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition is GRANTED - Defendant to complete production by 6/8/09. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. CSR: Patrick Heard, CSR # 11055

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY OREN P. NOAH OF THE BRAYTON & PURCELL LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ANGEL L. LEWIS OF THE BUTY & CURLIANO LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 267-3000 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY WESTERN NEVADA SUPPLY COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WESTERN NEVADA SUPPLY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN GIVEN PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS DEPOSITION AND DECLARATION, THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/AY
